She can be seen as a cute yet highly supportive teammate since her fighting skills are subpar to the other characters in her squad. Even though that she isn't highly smart with combat, she is usually the morale booster of their team, and gives everyone the emotional support that they need. name: Nana Sunohara
description: Nana Sunohara is the younger sister of Ayaka Sunohara. Unlike Ayaka Sunohara, Nana is a more upbeat girl who is excited by almost everything.

description: A draph girl who is extremely skilled and likes to train in order to be noticed by a distant relative Octo.

name: Natalia Kamiński
nativeName: ナタリア・カミンスキー
description: A freelance mercenary who sold information concerning Noritaka and his research on vampires. She rescues a young Kiritsugu and takes him as her apprentice. During her last mission, she is able to successfully kill a Dead Apostle, ~!but dies when Kiritsugu shoots down the plane she is on to prevent the infected passengers from infecting others when the plane landed. Kiritsugu's last words to her reveal that he viewed her as his mother.!~

name: Niikura
description: Niikura is Nagumo's best friend and roommate. Nagumo constantly asks her for money. She is more responsible than Nagumo, but her constant dealing with Nagumo's antics has left her with a short temper. She owns a yellow scooter that she rides around the City. She is an aspiring photographer.

name: Noah
description: __Height:__ 168cm __Affiliation:__ Light Cavalry Crew Noah is seen as arrogant, and dislikes losing as seen when she lost a race against Jay Jo which led her to stalk him to his home and school, wanting to have a rematch with him using her personal bike and equipment.

name: Remon Yamano
description: __Height__: 139 cm (4'7") __Class__: 3rd Year A short, third year high school student with a petite appearance and a distinctive voice. She is generally cold towards people, but befriends Ichika when they first meet. She is good at picking locks and can be quite mischievous, such as when she makes the rest of the group drink an alcoholic drink, then records them sleeping. name: Riku Kurose
description: A psychiatrist currently curing Shirotani from his mysophobia.

name: Rio Mason Busujima
description: Half-American on his father's side, and half-Japanese on his mother's. He speaks and behaves as if he were still a soldier. During his time as a naval officer, he respected rank above anything else. For example, if a superior told him that white was black, then white was black. In dire circumstances, he shows no mercy to his enemies.

Known as the Crimson Satan, he is the leader of the Four Great Satans who rule the Underworld with the title of "Lucifer". description: A player in Darwin Game who has the sigil to control ice. Sui's twin brother, who died in an accident 1 year ago. D-game brought his soul back in Sui's body.

name: Talulah
description: __Height:__ 178 cm __Place of Birth:__ Lungmen, Yan __Race:__ Draco Talulah is the leader of the rebel group Reunion, intent on destroying those who oppress the infected. name: Toboe
description: Toboe is the youngest of the group often acting more like a puppy. Toboe was raised by an elderly woman as a pet. She gave Toboe his silver bracelets. Although she died, Toboe has an affection for humans that none of the other wolves can understand (with the exception of Blue). Toboe looks up to Tsume and usually follows him when the group splits up. He also seems to have the best hearing out of all of them. Toboe seems to be a red wolf or an Arabian Wolf in the series. (Source: Wikipedia) Toboe

name: Wakasa
description: Wakasa is a merman who gets saved by a young man called Tatsumi, who later ends up living in Tatsumi's bathtub.

name: Yukiko Gosho
description: Makoto's friend. She is antisocial and withdrawn from the rest of the group, she likes to eat lunch alone in a secluded place outside the classroom.

name: Yuzuki Eba
description: __Height:__ 155 cm She is the female protagonist of the series. She moved from Tokyo to her father's hometown. She is staying with the Kirishimas, who are her father's acquaintances. She has a sociable personality and gets along with others easily. She confesses that she likes Haruto, but it does not prevent her from helping Haruto get closer to Nanami.
